title: RDQ
description: Cross Server | Quests | Ranks | Tree | Passives/Unlocks | Stats | Achievements
body:
# 🌧️ RDQ 6 — RaindropQuests  
**Progression. Competition. Identity.**

RDQ is a modern, performance-focused Minecraft progression plugin that combines **ranks, bounties, quests, and perks** into one cohesive system designed for long-term servers.

Whether you run a **survival server**, **RPG world**, or **competitive economy**, RDQ gives players meaningful goals — and reasons to keep playing.

Questions? Ask us on [Discord](https://discord.gg/cSyUXSeZ8k)!

> ⚠️ **Current Status**  
> RDQ 6 is currently in **ALPHA**  
> • Rank, Perks, & Bounty systems are functional  
> • Quests are actively being developed  

---

## 🚀 Why RDQ?

Most progression plugins solve **one problem**.  
RDQ solves **player motivation**.

✔ Clear progression paths  
✔ Player-driven PvP incentives  
✔ RPG-style perks & abilities  
✔ Built for modern servers (Java 21, async, scalable)

RDQ is designed to be:
- **Fast** (async operations + caching)
- **Stable** (database-backed persistence)
- **Flexible** (fully config-driven)
- **Future-proof** (Java 21+, modern APIs)
- **Backwards Compatible** (planned update)

---

## 🧭 Core Systems

### 🏆 Rank Progression System
Create meaningful player identities using class-style rank trees.

**Features**
- Multiple rank trees (Warrior, Mage, Rogue, Cleric, Merchant, Ranger)
- GUI-based progression views
- Configurable requirements:
  - Player statistics
  - Permissions
  - Economy balance
  - Items
- Optional **LuckPerms integration** for automatic group assignment

Perfect for:
- RPG servers  
- Class-based survival  
- Economy-driven progression  

---

### 🎯 Bounty Hunting System
Turn PvP into **player-driven content**.

**Features**
- Player-placed bounties
- Configurable minimum & maximum bounty values
- Item and currency based bounties
- Pooled bounties
- Multiple payout methods:
  - Instant reward
  - Virtual storage
  - Drop-on-death
  - Chest-based rewards *(Premium)*
- Hunter statistics & leaderboards
- Vault economy integration

Great for:
- PvP servers  
- Survival with risk/reward  
- Anti-grief incentive systems  

---

### ⚡ Perk System *(In Development)*
Unlock abilities that feel **earned**, not overpowered.

**Planned & In Progress**
- Toggleable and event-based perks
- Potion effects, passive bonuses, special abilities
- Cooldowns & durations
- Rank-based & requirement-based unlocking
- Premium-only perk types planned

> 🔧 Perks are actively being developed and will enter **beta** during RDQ 6.x

---

### 📜 Quest System *(Planned)*
Quests will integrate directly with:
- Rank progression
- Perks
- Economy rewards
- [RaindropCentral](https://raindropcentral.com)

Designed for:
- Daily & repeatable quests
- Long-term progression goals
- RPG storylines
- Multi-server questlines

---

## 🌐 [RaindropCentral](https://raindropcentral.com) Integration

**Unify Your Minecraft Ecosystem**

RDQ is designed to integrate seamlessly with **RaindropCentral**, transforming your server into a connected ecosystem that extends beyond Minecraft itself.

Unify your server with:
- **Analytics**
- **Storytelling** (coming soon)
- **Rewards** (coming soon)
- **Player identity**
- **Voting** (coming soon)

All managed through a single, cohesive control center.

### What [RaindropCentral](https://raindropcentral.com) Adds

✔ Web-based dashboards for player progression  
✔ Centralized tracking of ranks, bounties, perks, and future quests (coming soon)  
✔ Online & offline rewards tied to in-game achievements (coming soon)  
✔ Data-driven insights into player behavior and engagement  
✔ Community-facing profiles that make progression visible and meaningful (in development)  

### Why It Matters

Empower your community with **data-driven insights** and **engaging player experiences** that exist both **in-game and online**.

[RaindropCentral](https://raindropcentral.com) allows you to:
- Tell your server’s story beyond the game world  
- Reward players across platforms  
- Build long-term engagement with transparency and progression visibility  

> 🔗 RDQ works independently, but becomes exponentially more powerful when connected to **RaindropCentral**.

---

## ⚙️ Performance & Design

RDQ is not a legacy plugin. Newer version optimization comes first. Older version support planned.

- Java **21**
- Async-first architecture
- Virtual threads where supported
- Database-backed persistence (Hibernate)
- Caffeine caching for hot data
- No blocking main-thread logic

Supported platforms:
- Bukkit
- Spigot
- Paper
- Folia

---

## 🧩 Free vs Premium

| Feature | Free | Premium |
|------|------|---------|
| Rank Trees | 1 active | Unlimited |
| Cross-tree Switching | ❌ | ✅ |
| Active Perks | 1 | Unlimited |
| Premium Perk Types | ❌ | ✅ |
| Bounty Distribution Modes | Instant only | All modes |
| Future Quest Features | Limited | Full |

---

## 🧾 Commands

/rq <admin | bounty | main | ranks>

---

## 🔐 Permissions

- `raindropquests.player`
- `raindropquests.admin.command`

---

## 🛠 Requirements

- **Java 21+**
- Minecraft **1.21**
- Bukkit / Spigot / Paper / Folia

### Optional Integrations
- Vault (economy)
- LuckPerms (permissions)
- [RaindropCentral](https://raindropcentral.com) (web ecosystem & analytics)
- Plugin support such as Skills and Jobs (in development)

---

## 📦 Installation

1. Download and install [RCore](https://raindropcentral.com/products/rcore)
2. Download the appropriate RDQ JAR
2. Place it in your server’s `plugins/` folder
3. Start the server
4. Configure files in `plugins/RDQ/`
5. Restart & enjoy 🚀

---

## 🧪 Development Status

| System | Status |
|------|--------|
| Ranks | ✅ Stable |
| Bounties | ✅ Stable |
| Perks | ✅ Stable |
| Quests | 🛠 In Development |
| GUI Polish | 🛠 Ongoing |
| Balancing | 🛠 Ongoing |

RDQ 6 is actively developed with frequent updates.

---

## 💬 Who Is RDQ For?

✔ Servers focused on long-term player retention  
✔ RPG or class-based survival servers  
✔ PvP servers that want meaningful risk/reward  
✔ Communities that want web-integrated progression  
✔ Owners tired of outdated, monolithic plugins  

---

## ❓ Frequently Asked Questions

### Is RDQ production-ready?
RDQ 6 is currently in **ALPHA**.  
The **Rank** and **Bounty** systems are stable and actively used, while **Perks** and **Quests** are still under development. Expect frequent updates as the plugin approaches beta.

### Does RDQ work without [RaindropCentral](https://raindropcentral.com)?
Yes. RDQ works fully as a standalone plugin.  
[RaindropCentral](https://raindropcentral.com) is an **optional integration** that adds web dashboards, analytics, and aggregated player data.

### Is RDQ pay-to-win?
No. RDQ focuses on **progression and engagement**, not unfair advantages.  
All perks and ranks are configurable, allowing server owners to balance gameplay to fit their community.

### Can I customize ranks, bounties, and perks?
Premium only. All systems are **fully configurable** via YAML:
- Rank trees and requirements
- Bounty limits and payouts
- Perk effects, cooldowns, and unlock conditions

No code changes required.

### Does RDQ support economy and permissions plugins?
Yes.
- **Vault** for economy integration
- **LuckPerms** for permission and rank group syncing

Both are optional. We fully support **JECurrency** integration. Other multi-currency plguins planned as needed.

### Will more features be added?
Yes. RDQ is actively developed.  
Planned features include:
- Full quest system
- Full perk system
- Expanded [RaindropCentral](https://raindropcentral.com) integration
- GUI and UX improvements

## 🌧️ RDQ — Give Your Players a Reason to Progress

RDQ isn’t just another plugin.  
It’s a **foundation for progression-based gameplay** —  
and with **[RaindropCentral](https://raindropcentral.com)**, a complete Minecraft ecosystem.
